3070550.name: AnyMe Cam
3070550.description:
Be your avatar anywhere. Vtubing and Game Streaming as your character in a few clicks. 

Stream yourself in any software where you can pick a camera. Works on Youtube, Discord, Zoom, Twitch, and OBS to name a few. All you need is your regular cam setup to get great 60 FPS head, hand and expression animation.

Game Streamer? Try out our new Stream-Event feature. Boost monetisation and engagement with overlay animations that sync with the game/event you are streaming. Set up animations that are triggered by keywords/emotes in Twitch, YouTube, and Discord chat. Make animations exclusive to subscribers, trigger when you send a Cheermote, or a message in Super Chat.

Vtuber who owns your character already on another platform?

You can now upload your VRM, GLB/GLTF, and FBX avatar directly to animate it with our system.

 

Create your Avatar

Create your custom head, morph all parts, choose from 50+ hairstyles and 100+ make/face design options. Mix and match bodies and scenes to stand out.

 

Record Videos

Record yourself as an avatar and share it anywhere. Supports up to 10 minute videos at this time.

Other editing tools include adding filters like night vision and Tetris to your videos as well as layering stickers and gifs.

 

Are you a 3D artist? 

Create and sell your avatars on our marketplace.
